## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager screen for Hassan Rashid for the Technical Managing Editor position at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/KoJf4GTrusFKzahx-dPCU3-cqCVFGY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Hassan demonstrated strong technical skills and proactivity by building a content analysis tool](https://fathom.video/share/KoJf4GTrusFKzahx-dPCU3-cqCVFGY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [The role involves 50% internal work and 50% client relationship management](https://fathom.video/share/KoJf4GTrusFKzahx-dPCU3-cqCVFGY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
  - [Matthew expressed some uncertainty about Hassan's fit for the client-facing aspects of the role](https://fathom.video/share/KoJf4GTrusFKzahx-dPCU3-cqCVFGY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)
  - [GrowthX uses an 8-12 week sprint process to adapt tools for client needs](https://fathom.video/share/KoJf4GTrusFKzahx-dPCU3-cqCVFGY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1694.0)

## Topics

### Hassan's Background and Experience

  - [Worked as a PM for 2 years at Adapar, a B2B fintech wealth management platform](https://fathom.video/share/KoJf4GTrusFKzahx-dPCU3-cqCVFGY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
  - [Shipped \~40 features, increasing client retention and user adoption](https://fathom.video/share/KoJf4GTrusFKzahx-dPCU3-cqCVFGY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Acted as a bridge between engineering teams and clients](https://fathom.video/share/KoJf4GTrusFKzahx-dPCU3-cqCVFGY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [Created client-facing docs, release notes, and help articles](https://fathom.video/share/KoJf4GTrusFKzahx-dPCU3-cqCVFGY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [Has some freelance SEO experience](https://fathom.video/share/KoJf4GTrusFKzahx-dPCU3-cqCVFGY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)

### Content Analysis Tool Demo

  - [Hassan built a tool to analyze article changes and check brief compliance](https://fathom.video/share/KoJf4GTrusFKzahx-dPCU3-cqCVFGY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [Features include:](https://fathom.video/share/KoJf4GTrusFKzahx-dPCU3-cqCVFGY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
      - [Overall content change analysis](https://fathom.video/share/KoJf4GTrusFKzahx-dPCU3-cqCVFGY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
      - [Section-by-section comparison](https://fathom.video/share/KoJf4GTrusFKzahx-dPCU3-cqCVFGY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
      - [Side-by-side view of original and updated content](https://fathom.video/share/KoJf4GTrusFKzahx-dPCU3-cqCVFGY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
  - [Tool aims to catch AI hallucinations and ensure adherence to briefs](https://fathom.video/share/KoJf4GTrusFKzahx-dPCU3-cqCVFGY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)

### GrowthX Workflows and Processes

  - [Use validations and diff checks in content pipelines](https://fathom.video/share/KoJf4GTrusFKzahx-dPCU3-cqCVFGY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [Employ agentic processes with parallel validations](https://fathom.video/share/KoJf4GTrusFKzahx-dPCU3-cqCVFGY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Diff checks are character-by-character for internal use, idea-by-idea for clients](https://fathom.video/share/KoJf4GTrusFKzahx-dPCU3-cqCVFGY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1451.0)
  - [Work on 8-12 week sprints to adapt tools for specific client needs](https://fathom.video/share/KoJf4GTrusFKzahx-dPCU3-cqCVFGY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1694.0)
  - [Standard client contracts are yearly with quarterly high-resolution plans](https://fathom.video/share/KoJf4GTrusFKzahx-dPCU3-cqCVFGY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1957.0)

### Managing Editor Role at GrowthX

  - [50% internal work, 50% client relationship management](https://fathom.video/share/KoJf4GTrusFKzahx-dPCU3-cqCVFGY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
  - [Handles weekly client meetings, reporting, and day-to-day relationship management](https://fathom.video/share/KoJf4GTrusFKzahx-dPCU3-cqCVFGY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
  - [Participates in strategy discussions with directors](https://fathom.video/share/KoJf4GTrusFKzahx-dPCU3-cqCVFGY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)
  - [Balances tactical execution with strategic input](https://fathom.video/share/KoJf4GTrusFKzahx-dPCU3-cqCVFGY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1626.0)

### Content Quality and LLM Strategy

  - [Matthew (CCO) works on both ground-level execution and high-level strategy](https://fathom.video/share/KoJf4GTrusFKzahx-dPCU3-cqCVFGY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=2053.0)
  - [Focuses on closing gaps between pipeline output and client-ready content](https://fathom.video/share/KoJf4GTrusFKzahx-dPCU3-cqCVFGY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
  - [Experiments with new processes to improve efficiency and quality](https://fathom.video/share/KoJf4GTrusFKzahx-dPCU3-cqCVFGY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=2128.0)
  - [Aims to reduce time to deliver client work through continuous improvement](https://fathom.video/share/KoJf4GTrusFKzahx-dPCU3-cqCVFGY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=2161.0)

### Client Success Metrics

  - [Results timeline varies by engagement type](https://fathom.video/share/KoJf4GTrusFKzahx-dPCU3-cqCVFGY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=2264.0)
  - [For content engagements, early traction expected in 4-5 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/KoJf4GTrusFKzahx-dPCU3-cqCVFGY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=2284.0)
  - [Key metrics: views, engagement times, LLM visibility, citations](https://fathom.video/share/KoJf4GTrusFKzahx-dPCU3-cqCVFGY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=2296.0)
  - [Long-term growth often follows a logarithmic rather than linear pattern](https://fathom.video/share/KoJf4GTrusFKzahx-dPCU3-cqCVFGY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=2329.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Matthew to ponder Hassan's fit for the role, particularly regarding client-facing aspects](https://fathom.video/share/KoJf4GTrusFKzahx-dPCU3-cqCVFGY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)
  - [GrowthX team to circle back and reach out to Hassan with a decision](https://fathom.video/share/KoJf4GTrusFKzahx-dPCU3-cqCVFGY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=2377.0)
